---
ID: SLD-FE-440
Title: Approval Aging SLA Signal and Escalation UI
Status: Backlog
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-25
---

As an admin reviewer
I want pending approvals ranked by age with clear SLA state
So governance requests do not stall unnoticed and user journeys do not dead-end

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Approval queue surfaces submitted-at age and SLA status badges (on-time, due-soon, overdue).
- [ ] Queue supports sorting/filtering by age, type, and requester.
- [ ] Overdue approvals show escalation action affordance and reason capture.
- [ ] Requesters can see non-admin status progression without admin-only controls.
- [ ] UI copy and notifications avoid dead-end messaging when approvals are delayed.
